linkedin_connection.colvin_enterprises: Saw your work at {company} — impressive stuff. I help Indianapolis businesses automate their operations with AI. Would love to connect and trade ideas.
linkedin_connection.first_keys_indy: Hi {name} — helping Marion County families navigate the homebuying process. Always glad to connect with folks working in the community.
linkedin_connection.music_theory_secrets: Hey {name} — fellow musician here. I teach gospel piano theory and love connecting with church musicians. Would love to be in each other's network.
linkedin_connection.indiana_backflow: Hi {name} — I run a contractor resource directory for Indiana. Always connecting with professionals in the trades. Would love to add you.
